untranslatable_reason: This signal requires identification of local maxima (E'₁ and E'₁₁) within a 38-day rolling window and calculation of their average, with tolerance comparison. The allowed indicator set does not include: (1) a local maximum/peak detection function, (2) historical window-based extrema identification, or (3) ability to reference specific maxima positions (t₀, t₁) within a rolling window. The Donchian channels (dc_upper) provide window highs but not identification of distinct local maxima separated by >22 days. Pattern recognition of this complexity requires custom peak-detection logic beyond the available price and standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: Signal KAUFMAN_DRY_4 describes a Double Top pattern detection algorithm requiring: (1) identification of two distinct local price maxima within a 38-trading-day window, (2) verification that these maxima are within 1.5% of their average, (3) confirmation that they are separated by more than 22 trading days. This is a structural pattern recognition task that cannot be expressed using only simple threshold comparisons on available indicators. Would require: custom peak-detection function, rolling window state tracking, or historical bar-by-bar pattern matching capabilities.
